title: Sentinel Shield required-checks drift audit report
description: Machine report emitted by scripts/audits/required-checks-audit.sh. Diffs the live jobs.<id>.name across .github/workflows/*.yml against config/required-checks.json. A non-empty 'violations' array means the gate failed closed on registry drift.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the audit run.

violations.description: One object per drift finding. Empty when status=pass.

name.description: The check name in question (null for a missing-workflow).

from.description: For type=renamed, the previous (registered) check name; null otherwise.
